facebook.content: "I want you to know that you are not alone in your struggles. The Lord is always with you, guiding you through the darkest of times. His presence is a refuge, a shelter from the storm. Don't lose faith, don't lose heart, He is your strength. As He says in Isaiah 41:10, "Fear not, for I am with you; be not dismayed, for I am your God; I will strengthen you and help you; I will uphold you with my righteous right hand." So I charge you today: Stand on the rock of God's Word. Stand on His promises.
facebook.cta:
Learn more about our mission
https://increasingfaith.net/about.html
facebook.fullPost:
"I want you to know that you are not alone in your struggles. The Lord is always with you, guiding you through the darkest of times. His presence is a refuge, a shelter from the storm. Don't lose faith, don't lose heart, He is your strength. As He says in Isaiah 41:10, "Fear not, for I am with you; be not dismayed, for I am your God; I will strengthen you and help you; I will uphold you with my righteous right hand." So I charge you today: Stand on the rock of God's Word. Stand on His promises.

#Jesus #KingdomOfGod #IncreasingFaith

instagram.content:
"My son/daughter, I see you striving to walk in the light. Don't let darkness creep in. Remember, the Lord is your light. His presence is what illuminates the path ahead.

You don't have to be afraid of what's to come. It's already been prepared for you. Don't let fear hold you back. Get moving towards your breakthrough.

You are on the move, and nothing is going to stop you.

tiktok.content: You think you're not enough, but the Bible says you're fearfully and wonderfully made. It doesn't matter what the world says, what matters is what you believe about yourself. You are a masterpiece. I want you to stand up and tell the devil you're a masterpiece. Say it with me: I'm a masterpiece.
